title: CLI Credentials
description: Manage secure CLI binaries available to agents with injected credentials.
emptyDescription: Add a CLI credential to allow agents to run authenticated CLI commands.

delete.title: Delete CLI Credential
delete.description: Remove "{{name}}"? Agents that depend on it will lose access.

form.presetHint: Selecting a preset auto-fills fields and shows required env vars.
form.encryptedHint: Values are encrypted and never shown. Variable names are listed below; leave a value empty to keep the stored secret, or type a new value to replace it.
form.noEnvVarsHint: Click "Add Variable" to define environment variables for this CLI tool.
form.envValueWarning: Plaintext values are visible to authorized users.
form.envValueSuspicious: This plaintext value looks like a token, password, or key.
form.invalidEnvKey: "{{key}}" is not a valid env variable name (use A-Z, 0-9, underscore).
form.binaryPathHint: Leave blank to auto-detect from PATH
form.binaryNotFound: Binary not found in server PATH
form.isGlobalHint: When off, only agents with explicit grants can use this CLI

agentAccess.title: Agent Access
agentAccess.description: Manage which agents can use {{name}} and which credential they use.

agentCredentials.title: Agent Credentials
agentCredentials.description: Configure PAT, SSH key, or env credentials that {{name}} can use when a selected agent runs it.
agentCredentials.securityHint: Anyone with access to the selected agent can cause that agent to use this credential.
agentCredentials.envRequired: At least one environment variable is required

userCredentials.title: Advanced User Overrides
userCredentials.description: Optional per-user overrides for {{name}}. Use Agent Credentials for normal git PAT or SSH setup.
userCredentials.envRequired: At least one environment variable is required
userCredentials.mergeHint: Use only for personal overrides. Chat users (Telegram, Discord, etc.) must be merged into a tenant user first via Contacts page.
userCredentials.hostScopeRequired: Host scope is required for PAT and SSH credentials
userCredentials.hostScopeInvalid: Host scope must be a valid hostname (optional :port)
userCredentials.sshKeyPlaceholder:
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
…
-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
userCredentials.sshKeyInvalid: SSH key is not a valid unencrypted PEM private key
userCredentials.passphraseUnsupported: Passphrase-protected SSH keys are not supported. Provide an unencrypted key.

envVars.title: Environment Variables
envVars.overrideHelp: When enabled, this grant's env vars fully replace the binary's default env
envVars.revealError: Failed to reveal env — rate limited or permission denied
envVars.emptyState: No env overrides — binary defaults apply

list.truncated: Showing first 20 — use search or filter to find more
